flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Andrews University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.8k → $35.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Andrews University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.8k → $35.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Andrews University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Andrews University rose 10% between 2006 and 2009 (31.5% → 34.6%).
